languages.text: {n}Увы, попасть внутрь не вышло — вход в ксеноруины оказался оплетен корнями столь прочными, что их не взял даже мельта-заряд. Вы передаете губернатору Заркова приказ расчистить чащобы, преграждающие путь к месту, где сгинул ваш легендарный предок. Теперь вам остается только ждать.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Увы, попасть внутрь не вышло — вход в ксеноруины оказался оплетен корнями столь прочными, что их не взял даже мельта-заряд. Вы передаете губернатору Заркова приказ расчистить чащобы, преграждающие путь к месту, где сгинул ваш легендарный предок. Теперь вам остается только ждать.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Alas, gaining entry has proved impossible. The entrance to the xenoruins is entangled in roots so dense that even a melta charge has failed to breach them. You command the governor of Zarkov to clear the thickets blocking the path to the site where your legendary ancestor perished. All you can do now is wait.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Увы, попасть внутрь не вышло — вход в ксеноруины оказался оплетен корнями столь прочными, что их не взял даже мельта-заряд. Вы передаете губернатору Заркова приказ расчистить чащобы, преграждающие путь к месту, где сгинул ваш легендарный предок. Теперь вам остается только ждать.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Alas, gaining entry has proved impossible. The entrance to the xenoruins is entangled in roots so dense that even a melta charge has failed to breach them. You command the governor of Zarkov to clear the thickets blocking the path to the site where your legendary ancestor perished. All you can do now is wait.{/n}

{n}Alas, gaining entry has proved impossible. The entrance to the xenoruins is entangled in roots so dense that even a melta charge has failed to breach them. You command the governor of Zarkov to clear the thickets blocking the path to the site where your legendary ancestor perished.{/n}

{n}Alas, it was impossible to gain access to the temple — it was entangled in a dense knot of roots, which did not yield even to fyceline blasts. But the governor of Zarkov receives an order — and work on clearing the crypt of the legendary von Valancius begins.{/n}

{n}Alas, gaining entry has proved impossible. The entrance to the xenoruins is entangled in roots so dense that even a melta charge has failed to breach them. You command the governor of Zarkov to clear the thickets blocking the path to the site where your legendary ancestor perished. All you can do now is wait.{/n}

{n}Alas, it was impossible to gain access to the temple — it was entangled in a dense knot of roots, which did not yield even to fyceline blasts. But the governor of Zarkov receives an order — and so begins work on clearing the ruins that claimed the legendary von Valancius.{/n}

{n}Alas, gaining entry has proved impossible. The entrance to the xenoruins is tangled in roots so dense that even a melta charge has failed to breach them. You command the governor of Zarkov to clear the thickets barring the path to the site where your legendary ancestor perished.{/n}

{n}Alas, gaining entry has proved impossible. The entrance to the xenoruins is entangled in roots so dense that even a melta charge has failed to breach them. You command the governor of Zarkov to clear the thickets blocking the path to the site where your legendary ancestor perished.{/n}

languages.text: {n}残念ながら神殿へ入ることは不可能だった――それは濃く絡み合った根の塊に包まれており、フイゼリンの爆破でさえびくともしなかった。しかし、ザルコフの総督には命令が下り、伝説のフォン・ヴァランシウスの墓所を開放する作業が始まる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Alas, it was impossible to gain access to the temple — it was entangled in a dense knot of roots, which did not yield even to fyceline blasts. But the governor of Zarkov receives an order — and work on clearing the crypt of the legendary von Valancius begins.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ne yazık ki içeri girmek imkânsız. Zeno harabelerinin girişi o kadar yoğun köklerle dolanmış ki bir melta bombası bile onları aşmayı başaramadı. Zarkov valisine, efsanevi atanın can verdiği bölgeye giden yolu kapatan çalılıkları temizlemesini emrediyorsun. Artık tek yapabileceğin beklemek.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Alas, gaining entry has proved impossible. The entrance to the xenoruins is entangled in roots so dense that even a melta charge has failed to breach them. You command the governor of Zarkov to clear the thickets blocking the path to the site where your legendary ancestor perished. All you can do now is wait.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ne yazık ki içeri girmek imkânsız. Zeno harabelerinin girişi o kadar yoğun köklerle dolanmış ki bir melta bombası bile onları aşmayı başaramadı. Zarkov valisine, efsanevi atanın can verdiği bölgeye giden yolu kapatan çalılıkları temizlemesini emrediyorsun. Artık tek yapabileceğin beklemek.{/n}

languages.text: {n}可惜，那里根本无法进入。那异形遗迹的入口被密集的根须缠得严严实实，连热熔炸弹也无法撼动分毫。于是你命令扎尔科夫总督清理阻碍道路的根须丛，打通通往你先祖陨落之地的道路。如今，你所能做的唯有等待。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Alas, gaining entry has proved impossible. The entrance to the xenoruins is entangled in roots so dense that even a melta charge has failed to breach them. You command the governor of Zarkov to clear the thickets blocking the path to the site where your legendary ancestor perished. All you can do now is wait.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}可惜，那里根本无法进入。那异形遗迹的入口被密集的根须缠得严严实实，连热熔炸弹也无法撼动分毫。于是你命令扎尔科夫总督清理阻碍道路的根须丛，打通通往你先祖陨落之地的道路。如今，你所能做的唯有等待。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Leider war es unmöglich, hineinzugelangen. Der Zugang zu den Xenoruinen ist so dicht mit Wurzeln bewachsen, dass ihn nicht einmal eine Melterladung freisprengen konnte. Du befiehlst {nc|der Gouverneurin|dem Gouverneur} von Zarkov, den Weg zu den Ruinen, in denen dein legendärer Ahnherr verschwand, freizumachen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Alas, gaining entry has proved impossible. The entrance to the xenoruins is entangled in roots so dense that even a melta charge has failed to breach them. You command the governor of Zarkov to clear the thickets blocking the path to the site where your legendary ancestor perished.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Leider war es unmöglich, hineinzugelangen. Der Zugang zu den Xenoruinen ist so dicht mit Wurzeln bewachsen, dass ihn nicht einmal eine Melterladung freisprengen konnte. Du befiehlst {nc|der Gouverneurin|dem Gouverneur} von Zarkov, den Weg zu den Ruinen, in denen dein legendärer Ahnherr verschwand, freizumachen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Malheureusement, il s'est avéré impossible d'y accéder. L'entrée des xénoruines est barrée par un lacis de racines si dense que même une charge à fusion n'a pas suffi à percer une brèche. Vous ordonnez au gouverneur de Zarkov d'éliminer la végétation bloquant l'accès au lieu où votre ancêtre légendaire a trouvé la mort. Il ne vous reste plus qu'à attendre.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Alas, gaining entry has proved impossible. The entrance to the xenoruins is entangled in roots so dense that even a melta charge has failed to breach them. You command the governor of Zarkov to clear the thickets blocking the path to the site where your legendary ancestor perished. All you can do now is wait.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Malheureusement, il s'est avéré impossible d'y accéder. L'entrée des xénoruines est barrée par un lacis de racines si dense que même une charge à fusion n'a pas suffi à percer une brèche. Vous ordonnez au gouverneur de Zarkov d'éliminer la végétation bloquant l'accès au lieu où votre ancêtre légendaire a trouvé la mort. Il ne vous reste plus qu'à attendre.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Lamentablemente, no han logrado entrar. El acceso a las xenorruinas está cubierto por raíces tan densas que ni siquiera una carga de fusión ha podido atravesarlas. Ordenas a{nc| la gobernadora|l gobernador} de Zarkov que despeje la vegetación que obstruye el camino al lugar donde expiró tu legendario antepasado. Solo queda esperar.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Alas, gaining entry has proved impossible. The entrance to the xenoruins is entangled in roots so dense that even a melta charge has failed to breach them. You command the governor of Zarkov to clear the thickets blocking the path to the site where your legendary ancestor perished. All you can do now is wait.{/n}
